channel.title: Get blobjects thorped from nimdaghlian.github.io to demo
channel.description: MultiPass auto generated from a request to the https://octothorp.es//get API

item.title: Web Components - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: OP ships a set of web components for displaying indexed content on any site.

item.title: Tags and Octothorpes - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: Octothorpes are like super-tags for websites. So they are designed to work seamlessly with any platform's normal method of tagging content.

item.title: Fun with RSS - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: The OP API outputs RSS for almost any query. Here are some combinations worth bookmarking.

item.title: Hashtags on Links - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: Bookmarks, citations, and other typed relationships can carry their own hashtag terms, independent of the page's tags.

item.title: Octothorpe Without Javascript - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: If you don't want to use javascript or display #s on the front end, you can use the pure-HTTP method.

item.title: Multipasses - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: Multipasses are reusable, shareable query objects that drive OP web components and feeds.

item.title: Octothorpe Anywhere - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: Implementing Octothorpes is really easy. Here are some sites on other platforms that already have it.

item.title: Match-All Tag Filtering - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: Use match=all to find pages that carry every one of a set of tags, not just any of them.

item.title: Link Types - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: OP supports typed page-to-page relationships: bookmarks, citations, buttons, and custom types.

item.title: Indexing Policy - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: You can flag your page as OK index by outside services if you can't or don't want to send the request from the page itself. Without the flag, it won't be scanned.

item.title: Image Indexing - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: OP now extracts and stores image metadata from indexed pages, making images available in API responses and on server listings.

item.title: The Demo Webring - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: OP makes it easy to run your own webring from your own website. This is the homepage of the OP Demo Webring.

item.title: Custom Harmonizer - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: Use a named harmonizer to turn standard HTML meta keywords into octothorpes — no OP-specific markup required.

item.title: Button-Based Indexing - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: OP can index a page triggered by loading a special version of our site button.

item.title: Backlinks - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: The idea of a backlink is as old as the concept of a hyperlink, but they're not as widely implemented as one-way links.

item.title: Post Date - OP DEV DEMO
item.description: Pages can declare their own publication date, which OP indexes and uses for date-based API filtering.
